plugins.name: prefer-jq
plugins.description: Blocks use of Python for JSON processing in Bash commands, enforcing jq instead

plugins.name: prefer-ast-grep
plugins.description: Redirects structural code searches from Grep to ast-grep. Requires ast-grep@ast-grep-marketplace.

plugins.name: enforce-native-search
plugins.description: Blocks grep/rg and find in Bash commands, enforcing ast-grep and the Glob tool instead
